chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1192 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of M.A 14400/15 18.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Chohan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. Mr. Liaquat Ali Malak, Advocate for respondent No.3. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not want to press the instant Constitutional Petition. A perusal of his vakalatnama shows that he has the power to compromise and withdraw the matter. Consequently, present petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
